settings.text: We believe the presentation is part of the gift. That's why we offer premium gift wrapping so your order arrives ready to give — no scissors, tape, or stress required.

settings.title: 1. Add Gift Wrapping
settings.text: At checkout, simply check the "Gift Wrapping" option and select your preferred wrapping style. Add a personal message to include with your gift.

settings.title: 2. We Wrap It Beautifully
settings.text: Your item is wrapped in premium tissue paper, placed in a branded ModernTimez gift box, and tied with a satin ribbon. Your personal message is printed on a gift card inside.

settings.title: 3. Delivered Gift-Ready
settings.text: Your beautifully wrapped gift ships directly to you or straight to your recipient. No prices or invoices are included — just pure gifting joy.

What's included:

  • Premium tissue paper in your choice of colour
  • Branded ModernTimez gift box
  • Satin ribbon and bow
  • Printed gift card with your personal message (up to 200 characters)

No pricing, no invoices — we never include pricing information in gift shipments. Your recipient will only see your thoughtful gift and message.

Ships directly to recipient — just enter their address at checkout. Perfect for sending gifts across the country or internationally.
